metadata.methodology: Waiting list data from NHS England gender dysphoria programme returns. Average wait calculated as median time from referral to first clinical appointment. Data covers England. Post-2023 data reflects transition from GIDS to new regional service model.
knownIssues: Service redesign from 2023 onward affects comparability of waiting list data
Under-18 figures held separately from adult services; combined total is approximate
Some patients referred under old GIDS system re-referred to new regional services
